title: IP whitelist
subtitle: Manage allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges when whitelist-only mode is enabled.
devNotice: IP access policy is disabled in development unless IP_ACCESS_FORCE=1 is set on the API server.
loadFailed: Unable to load IP access data.

whitelist.title: Whitelist (persisted, optional lockdown)
whitelist.description: When enabled, only listed CIDRs can reach the API (except /ping and /docs).
